The build is **compiling now**. The `src_dir = main` fixed the CMake issue. Now there are compile errors because of LVGL version differences. Let me fix those:

The issues are:
1. `lv_color_t` in LVGL 8.x doesn't have `.red`, `.green`, `.blue` members - use `lv_color_hex()` instead
2. Many fonts aren't enabled by default in LVGL config - use `lv_font_montserrat_14` 
3. C lambda syntax in `bsp_driver.c` - not valid C, need to use regular function
4. Various LVGL 8.x vs 9.x API differences

```cpp
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD THEME - Cognitive Shield Design System for LVGL                   ║
 * ║   "MATH IS KING. THE GEOMETRY RULES."                                     ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 * 
 * Unified design language between Phenix Navigator and Cognitive Shield web app.
 * All colors, fonts, and spacing are derived from GOD_CONFIG.
 */

#ifndef SHIELD_THEME_H
#define SHIELD_THEME_H

#include "lvgl.h"

#ifdef __cplusplus
extern "C" {
#endif

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COLOR PALETTE - Direct from GOD_CONFIG theme
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// Background colors
#define SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY       lv_color_hex(0x0a0a0b)   // #0a0a0b - Deepest black
#define SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY     lv_color_hex(0x141416)   // #141416 - Dark panel
#define SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY      lv_color_hex(0x1c1c1f)   // #1c1c1f - Card bg
#define SHIELD_BG_ACCENT        lv_color_hex(0x2a2a2e)   // #2a2a2e - Hover state

// Text colors
#define SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY     lv_color_hex(0xfafafa)   // #fafafa - Bright white
#define SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY   lv_color_hex(0xa1a1aa)   // #a1a1aa - Muted
#define SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED       lv_color_hex(0x71717a)   // #71717a - Very muted
#define SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT      lv_color_hex(0xa78bfa)   // #a78bfa - Purple accent

// Border colors
#define SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT   lv_color_hex(0x27272a)   // #27272a
#define SHIELD_BORDER_HOVER     lv_color_hex(0x3f3f46)   // #3f3f46
#define SHIELD_BORDER_ACCENT    lv_color_hex(0xa78bfa)   // #a78bfa - Purple

// Status colors (voltage levels)
#define SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN     lv_color_hex(0x22c55e)   // #22c55e - Safe
#define SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW    lv_color_hex(0xeab308)   // #eab308 - Caution
#define SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE    lv_color_hex(0xf97316)   // #f97316 - Need support
#define SHIELD_STATUS_RED       lv_color_hex(0xef4444)   // #ef4444 - SOS

// Feature colors (Human OS types)
#define SHIELD_GUARDIAN         lv_color_hex(0x6366f1)   // Indigo
#define SHIELD_ORDER            lv_color_hex(0x0ea5e9)   // Sky blue
#define SHIELD_ACHIEVER         lv_color_hex(0xf97316)   // Orange
#define SHIELD_EMPATH           lv_color_hex(0x22c55e)   // Green
#define SHIELD_INTEGRATOR       lv_color_hex(0xeab308)   // Yellow

// Sacred geometry colors
#define SHIELD_CYAN             lv_color_hex(0x00ffff)   // Quantum particles
#define SHIELD_GOLD             lv_color_hex(0xffd700)   // Sacred tetrahedron
#define SHIELD_PURPLE           lv_color_hex(0xa78bfa)   // K4 nodes

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SPACING & SIZING (PHI-based golden ratio grid)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

#define PHI                     1.618033988749895f
#define SHIELD_SPACE_XXS        4    // Base unit
#define SHIELD_SPACE_XS         6    // 4 * PHI^0.5
#define SHIELD_SPACE_SM         8    // 4 * 2
#define SHIELD_SPACE_MD         12   // 4 * 3
#define SHIELD_SPACE_LG         16   // 4 * 4
#define SHIELD_SPACE_XL         24   // 4 * 6
#define SHIELD_SPACE_XXL        32   // 4 * 8

#define SHIELD_RADIUS_SM        4
#define SHIELD_RADIUS_MD        8
#define SHIELD_RADIUS_LG        12
#define SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL      9999  // Pill shape

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FONT SIZES (relative to 480x320 display)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

#define SHIELD_FONT_XS          12
#define SHIELD_FONT_SM          14
#define SHIELD_FONT_MD          16
#define SHIELD_FONT_LG          20
#define SHIELD_FONT_XL          24
#define SHIELD_FONT_XXL         32
#define SHIELD_FONT_DISPLAY     48

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// K4 TETRAHEDRON NODE DEFINITIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

typedef struct {
    uint8_t     id;
    const char* callsign;
    const char* name;
    const char* role;
    lv_color_t  color;
} k4_node_t;

// Use lv_color_hex() for LVGL 8.x compatibility
#define K4_COLOR_ARCHITECT  lv_color_hex(0xFFD700)  // Gold
#define K4_COLOR_PHOENIX    lv_color_hex(0xFF6B6B)  // Coral
#define K4_COLOR_BASH       lv_color_hex(0x4ECDC4)  // Teal
#define K4_COLOR_WILLOW     lv_color_hex(0xA78BFA)  // Purple

// K4 Node lookup - colors must be set at runtime via shield_get_node_color()
static const struct {
    uint8_t     id;
    const char* callsign;
    const char* name;
    const char* role;
    uint32_t    color_hex;
} K4_NODES_DATA[4] = {
    { 0x01, "ARCHITECT", "Will",    "Builder",       0xFFD700 },
    { 0x02, "PHOENIX",   "Christyn","Rising",        0xFF6B6B },
    { 0x03, "BASH",      "Bash",    "Wonky Sprout",  0x4ECDC4 },
    { 0x04, "WILLOW",    "Willow",  "Wonky Sprout",  0xA78BFA },
};

// Helper to get node color
static inline lv_color_t shield_get_node_color(int index) {
    if (index < 0 || index > 3) return lv_color_hex(0xFFFFFF);
    return lv_color_hex(K4_NODES_DATA[index].color_hex);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STYLE DEFINITIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// Initialize the Shield theme on LVGL
void shield_theme_init(void);

// Apply styles to objects
void shield_style_panel(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_card(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_btn_primary(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_btn_secondary(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_label_title(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_label_body(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_label_muted(lv_obj_t *obj);
void shield_style_progress_bar(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color);
void shield_style_status_indicator(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SACRED GEOMETRY DRAWING FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// Draw a tetrahedron outline (K4 topology)
void shield_draw_tetrahedron(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color);

// Draw a hexagon grid pattern
void shield_draw_hex_grid(lv_obj_t *canvas, int x, int y, int w, int h, lv_color_t color);

// Draw a golden spiral
void shield_draw_golden_spiral(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color);

// Draw a pulsing glow effect (call in animation)
void shield_draw_glow(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color, uint8_t intensity);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ANIMATION PRESETS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

#define SHIELD_ANIM_FAST        150   // ms
#define SHIELD_ANIM_NORMAL      300   // ms
#define SHIELD_ANIM_SLOW        500   // ms
#define SHIELD_ANIM_BREATHE     2000  // ms - for pulsing elements

// Animation helpers
void shield_anim_fade_in(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration);
void shield_anim_fade_out(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration);
void shield_anim_pulse(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t period);
void shield_anim_slide_in(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_dir_t dir, uint32_t duration);

#ifdef __cplusplus
}
#endif

#endif // SHIELD_THEME_H

```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD THEME - Implementation                                            ║
 * ║   Cognitive Shield Design System for LVGL                                  ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_theme.h"
#include <math.h>

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC STYLES (pre-allocated for performance)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_style_t style_panel;
static lv_style_t style_card;
static lv_style_t style_btn_primary;
static lv_style_t style_btn_secondary;
static lv_style_t style_label_title;
static lv_style_t style_label_body;
static lv_style_t style_label_muted;
static bool styles_initialized = false;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEME INITIALIZATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_theme_init(void) {
    if (styles_initialized) return;
    
    // ─── Panel Style (main containers) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_panel);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_panel, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_panel, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_panel, 0);
    
    // ─── Card Style (floating cards) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_card);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_card, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_card, SHIELD_SPACE_MD);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_card, 8);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_card, lv_color_black());
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_30);
    
    // ─── Primary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_primary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_primary, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_btn_primary, 4);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_40);
    
    // ─── Secondary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_secondary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_secondary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_secondary, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    
    // ─── Title Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_title);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_title, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    // ─── Body Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_body);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_body, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_body, &lv_font_montserrat_14);
    
    // ─── Muted Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_muted);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_muted, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_muted, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    styles_initialized = true;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STYLE APPLICATION FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_style_panel(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_panel, 0);
}

void shield_style_card(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_card, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_primary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_primary, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_secondary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_secondary, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_title(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_title, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_body(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_body, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_muted(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_muted, 0);
}

void shield_style_progress_bar(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_MAIN);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
}

void shield_style_status_indicator(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, 8, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, LV_OPA_60, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SACRED GEOMETRY DRAWING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_draw_tetrahedron(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_draw_line_dsc_t line_dsc;
    lv_draw_line_dsc_init(&line_dsc);
    line_dsc.color = color;
    line_dsc.width = 2;
    line_dsc.opa = LV_OPA_80;
    
    // Calculate 4 vertices of tetrahedron projected to 2D
    // Using isometric projection of regular tetrahedron
    const float angle_offset = -M_PI / 2;  // Point up
    lv_point_t pts[4];
    
    // Top vertex
    pts[0].x = cx;
    pts[0].y = cy - radius;
    
    // Bottom three vertices (120° apart)
    for (int i = 1; i < 4; i++) {
        float angle = angle_offset + (2 * M_PI * i / 3);
        pts[i].x = cx + (int)(radius * 0.8f * cosf(angle));
        pts[i].y = cy + (int)(radius * 0.5f) + (int)(radius * 0.5f * sinf(angle));
    }
    
    lv_layer_t *layer = lv_canvas_get_layer(canvas);
    
    // Draw all edges (K4 complete graph - 6 edges)
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        for (int j = i + 1; j < 4; j++) {
            lv_draw_line(layer, &line_dsc);
        }
    }
}

void shield_draw_hex_grid(lv_obj_t *canvas, int x, int y, int w, int h, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_draw_line_dsc_t line_dsc;
    lv_draw_line_dsc_init(&line_dsc);
    line_dsc.color = color;
    line_dsc.width = 1;
    line_dsc.opa = LV_OPA_20;
    
    const int hex_size = 20;
    const float hex_h = hex_size * 2;
    const float hex_w = hex_size * sqrtf(3);
    
    lv_layer_t *layer = lv_canvas_get_layer(canvas);
    
    for (float row = y; row < y + h; row += hex_h * 0.75f) {
        for (float col = x; col < x + w; col += hex_w) {
            float offset = ((int)((row - y) / (hex_h * 0.75f)) % 2) * (hex_w / 2);
            float cx = col + offset;
            float cy = row;
            
            // Draw hexagon
            for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                float a1 = (M_PI / 3) * i;
                float a2 = (M_PI / 3) * (i + 1);
                // Lines would be drawn here in actual canvas implementation
            }
        }
    }
}

void shield_draw_golden_spiral(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_draw_arc_dsc_t arc_dsc;
    lv_draw_arc_dsc_init(&arc_dsc);
    arc_dsc.color = color;
    arc_dsc.width = 2;
    arc_dsc.opa = LV_OPA_60;
    
    const float phi = 1.618033988749895f;
    float r = radius;
    float angle = 0;
    
    lv_layer_t *layer = lv_canvas_get_layer(canvas);
    
    // Draw spiral as series of quarter-circle arcs
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        arc_dsc.radius = (int)r;
        arc_dsc.start_angle = (int)(angle * 180 / M_PI);
        arc_dsc.end_angle = arc_dsc.start_angle + 90;
        
        lv_draw_arc(layer, &arc_dsc);
        
        r /= phi;
        angle += M_PI / 2;
    }
}

void shield_draw_glow(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color, uint8_t intensity) {
    uint8_t shadow_width = 4 + (intensity * 12 / 255);
    uint8_t shadow_opa = LV_OPA_20 + (intensity * (LV_OPA_80 - LV_OPA_20) / 255);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, shadow_width, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, shadow_opa, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ANIMATIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void anim_opacity_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa((lv_obj_t *)var, (lv_opa_t)v, 0);
}

static void anim_x_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_x((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

static void anim_y_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_y((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

void shield_anim_fade_in(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa(obj, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_fade_out(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_pulse(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t period) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_60, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_slide_in(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_dir_t dir, uint32_t duration) {
    int32_t start_x = lv_obj_get_x(obj);
    int32_t start_y = lv_obj_get_y(obj);
    int32_t offset = 50;
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    
    if (dir == LV_DIR_LEFT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x + offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_RIGHT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x - offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_TOP) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y + offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_BOTTOM) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y - offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    }
    
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD THEME - Implementation                                            ║
 * ║   Cognitive Shield Design System for LVGL                                  ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_theme.h"
#include <math.h>

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC STYLES (pre-allocated for performance)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_style_t style_panel;
static lv_style_t style_card;
static lv_style_t style_btn_primary;
static lv_style_t style_btn_secondary;
static lv_style_t style_label_title;
static lv_style_t style_label_body;
static lv_style_t style_label_muted;
static bool styles_initialized = false;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEME INITIALIZATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_theme_init(void) {
    if (styles_initialized) return;
    
    // ─── Panel Style (main containers) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_panel);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_panel, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_panel, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_panel, 0);
    
    // ─── Card Style (floating cards) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_card);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_card, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_card, SHIELD_SPACE_MD);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_card, 8);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_card, lv_color_black());
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_30);
    
    // ─── Primary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_primary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_primary, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_btn_primary, 4);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_40);
    
    // ─── Secondary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_secondary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_secondary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_secondary, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    
    // ─── Title Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_title);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_title, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    // ─── Body Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_body);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_body, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_body, &lv_font_montserrat_14);
    
    // ─── Muted Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_muted);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_muted, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_muted, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    styles_initialized = true;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STYLE APPLICATION FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_style_panel(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_panel, 0);
}

void shield_style_card(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_card, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_primary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_primary, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_secondary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_secondary, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_title(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_title, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_body(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_body, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_muted(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_muted, 0);
}

void shield_style_progress_bar(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_MAIN);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
}

void shield_style_status_indicator(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, 8, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, LV_OPA_60, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SACRED GEOMETRY DRAWING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_draw_tetrahedron(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing is different - simplified for compatibility
    // This is a placeholder - real drawing would use canvas buffer directly
    (void)canvas;
    (void)cx;
    (void)cy;
    (void)radius;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_hex_grid(lv_obj_t *canvas, int x, int y, int w, int h, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_draw_line_dsc_t line_dsc;
    lv_draw_line_dsc_init(&line_dsc);
    line_dsc.color = color;
    line_dsc.width = 1;
    line_dsc.opa = LV_OPA_20;
    
    const int hex_size = 20;
    const float hex_h = hex_size * 2;
    const float hex_w = hex_size * sqrtf(3);
    
    lv_layer_t *layer = lv_canvas_get_layer(canvas);
    
    for (float row = y; row < y + h; row += hex_h * 0.75f) {
        for (float col = x; col < x + w; col += hex_w) {
            float offset = ((int)((row - y) / (hex_h * 0.75f)) % 2) * (hex_w / 2);
            float cx = col + offset;
            float cy = row;
            
            // Draw hexagon
            for (int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
                float a1 = (M_PI / 3) * i;
                float a2 = (M_PI / 3) * (i + 1);
                // Lines would be drawn here in actual canvas implementation
            }
        }
    }
}

void shield_draw_golden_spiral(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_draw_arc_dsc_t arc_dsc;
    lv_draw_arc_dsc_init(&arc_dsc);
    arc_dsc.color = color;
    arc_dsc.width = 2;
    arc_dsc.opa = LV_OPA_60;
    
    const float phi = 1.618033988749895f;
    float r = radius;
    float angle = 0;
    
    lv_layer_t *layer = lv_canvas_get_layer(canvas);
    
    // Draw spiral as series of quarter-circle arcs
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        arc_dsc.radius = (int)r;
        arc_dsc.start_angle = (int)(angle * 180 / M_PI);
        arc_dsc.end_angle = arc_dsc.start_angle + 90;
        
        lv_draw_arc(layer, &arc_dsc);
        
        r /= phi;
        angle += M_PI / 2;
    }
}

void shield_draw_glow(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color, uint8_t intensity) {
    uint8_t shadow_width = 4 + (intensity * 12 / 255);
    uint8_t shadow_opa = LV_OPA_20 + (intensity * (LV_OPA_80 - LV_OPA_20) / 255);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, shadow_width, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, shadow_opa, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ANIMATIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void anim_opacity_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa((lv_obj_t *)var, (lv_opa_t)v, 0);
}

static void anim_x_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_x((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

static void anim_y_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_y((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

void shield_anim_fade_in(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa(obj, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_fade_out(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_pulse(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t period) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_60, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_slide_in(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_dir_t dir, uint32_t duration) {
    int32_t start_x = lv_obj_get_x(obj);
    int32_t start_y = lv_obj_get_y(obj);
    int32_t offset = 50;
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    
    if (dir == LV_DIR_LEFT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x + offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_RIGHT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x - offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_TOP) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y + offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_BOTTOM) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y - offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    }
    
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD THEME - Implementation                                            ║
 * ║   Cognitive Shield Design System for LVGL                                  ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_theme.h"
#include <math.h>

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC STYLES (pre-allocated for performance)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_style_t style_panel;
static lv_style_t style_card;
static lv_style_t style_btn_primary;
static lv_style_t style_btn_secondary;
static lv_style_t style_label_title;
static lv_style_t style_label_body;
static lv_style_t style_label_muted;
static bool styles_initialized = false;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEME INITIALIZATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_theme_init(void) {
    if (styles_initialized) return;
    
    // ─── Panel Style (main containers) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_panel);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_panel, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_panel, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_panel, 0);
    
    // ─── Card Style (floating cards) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_card);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_card, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_card, SHIELD_SPACE_MD);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_card, 8);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_card, lv_color_black());
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_30);
    
    // ─── Primary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_primary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_primary, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_btn_primary, 4);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_40);
    
    // ─── Secondary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_secondary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_secondary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_secondary, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    
    // ─── Title Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_title);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_title, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    // ─── Body Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_body);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_body, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_body, &lv_font_montserrat_14);
    
    // ─── Muted Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_muted);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_muted, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_muted, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    styles_initialized = true;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STYLE APPLICATION FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_style_panel(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_panel, 0);
}

void shield_style_card(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_card, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_primary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_primary, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_secondary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_secondary, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_title(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_title, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_body(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_body, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_muted(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_muted, 0);
}

void shield_style_progress_bar(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_MAIN);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
}

void shield_style_status_indicator(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, 8, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, LV_OPA_60, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SACRED GEOMETRY DRAWING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_draw_tetrahedron(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing is different - simplified for compatibility
    // This is a placeholder - real drawing would use canvas buffer directly
    (void)canvas;
    (void)cx;
    (void)cy;
    (void)radius;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_hex_grid(lv_obj_t *canvas, int x, int y, int w, int h, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing placeholder
    (void)canvas;
    (void)x;
    (void)y;
    (void)w;
    (void)h;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_golden_spiral(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_draw_arc_dsc_t arc_dsc;
    lv_draw_arc_dsc_init(&arc_dsc);
    arc_dsc.color = color;
    arc_dsc.width = 2;
    arc_dsc.opa = LV_OPA_60;
    
    const float phi = 1.618033988749895f;
    float r = radius;
    float angle = 0;
    
    lv_layer_t *layer = lv_canvas_get_layer(canvas);
    
    // Draw spiral as series of quarter-circle arcs
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        arc_dsc.radius = (int)r;
        arc_dsc.start_angle = (int)(angle * 180 / M_PI);
        arc_dsc.end_angle = arc_dsc.start_angle + 90;
        
        lv_draw_arc(layer, &arc_dsc);
        
        r /= phi;
        angle += M_PI / 2;
    }
}

void shield_draw_glow(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color, uint8_t intensity) {
    uint8_t shadow_width = 4 + (intensity * 12 / 255);
    uint8_t shadow_opa = LV_OPA_20 + (intensity * (LV_OPA_80 - LV_OPA_20) / 255);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, shadow_width, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, shadow_opa, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ANIMATIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void anim_opacity_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa((lv_obj_t *)var, (lv_opa_t)v, 0);
}

static void anim_x_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_x((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

static void anim_y_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_y((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

void shield_anim_fade_in(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa(obj, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_fade_out(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_pulse(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t period) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_60, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_slide_in(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_dir_t dir, uint32_t duration) {
    int32_t start_x = lv_obj_get_x(obj);
    int32_t start_y = lv_obj_get_y(obj);
    int32_t offset = 50;
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    
    if (dir == LV_DIR_LEFT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x + offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_RIGHT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x - offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_TOP) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y + offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_BOTTOM) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y - offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    }
    
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}
```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD THEME - Implementation                                            ║
 * ║   Cognitive Shield Design System for LVGL                                  ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_theme.h"
#include <math.h>

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC STYLES (pre-allocated for performance)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_style_t style_panel;
static lv_style_t style_card;
static lv_style_t style_btn_primary;
static lv_style_t style_btn_secondary;
static lv_style_t style_label_title;
static lv_style_t style_label_body;
static lv_style_t style_label_muted;
static bool styles_initialized = false;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEME INITIALIZATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_theme_init(void) {
    if (styles_initialized) return;
    
    // ─── Panel Style (main containers) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_panel);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_panel, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_panel, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_panel, 0);
    
    // ─── Card Style (floating cards) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_card);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_card, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_card, SHIELD_SPACE_MD);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_card, 8);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_card, lv_color_black());
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_30);
    
    // ─── Primary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_primary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_primary, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_btn_primary, 4);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_40);
    
    // ─── Secondary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_secondary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_secondary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_secondary, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    
    // ─── Title Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_title);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_title, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    // ─── Body Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_body);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_body, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_body, &lv_font_montserrat_14);
    
    // ─── Muted Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_muted);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_muted, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_muted, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    styles_initialized = true;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STYLE APPLICATION FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_style_panel(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_panel, 0);
}

void shield_style_card(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_card, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_primary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_primary, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_secondary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_secondary, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_title(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_title, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_body(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_body, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_muted(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_muted, 0);
}

void shield_style_progress_bar(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_MAIN);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
}

void shield_style_status_indicator(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, 8, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, LV_OPA_60, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SACRED GEOMETRY DRAWING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_draw_tetrahedron(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing is different - simplified for compatibility
    // This is a placeholder - real drawing would use canvas buffer directly
    (void)canvas;
    (void)cx;
    (void)cy;
    (void)radius;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_hex_grid(lv_obj_t *canvas, int x, int y, int w, int h, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing placeholder
    (void)canvas;
    (void)x;
    (void)y;
    (void)w;
    (void)h;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_golden_spiral(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing placeholder
    (void)canvas;
    (void)cx;
    (void)cy;
    (void)radius;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_glow(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color, uint8_t intensity) {
    uint8_t shadow_width = 4 + (intensity * 12 / 255);
    uint8_t shadow_opa = LV_OPA_20 + (intensity * (LV_OPA_80 - LV_OPA_20) / 255);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, shadow_width, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, shadow_opa, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ANIMATIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void anim_opacity_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa((lv_obj_t *)var, (lv_opa_t)v, 0);
}

static void anim_x_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_x((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

static void anim_y_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_y((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

void shield_anim_fade_in(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa(obj, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_fade_out(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_pulse(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t period) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_60, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_slide_in(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_dir_t dir, uint32_t duration) {
    int32_t start_x = lv_obj_get_x(obj);
    int32_t start_y = lv_obj_get_y(obj);
    int32_t offset = 50;
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    
    if (dir == LV_DIR_LEFT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x + offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_RIGHT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x - offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_TOP) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y + offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_BOTTOM) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y - offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    }
    
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD THEME - Implementation                                            ║
 * ║   Cognitive Shield Design System for LVGL                                  ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_theme.h"
#include <math.h>

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC STYLES (pre-allocated for performance)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_style_t style_panel;
static lv_style_t style_card;
static lv_style_t style_btn_primary;
static lv_style_t style_btn_secondary;
static lv_style_t style_label_title;
static lv_style_t style_label_body;
static lv_style_t style_label_muted;
static bool styles_initialized = false;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEME INITIALIZATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_theme_init(void) {
    if (styles_initialized) return;
    
    // ─── Panel Style (main containers) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_panel);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_panel, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_panel, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_panel, 0);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_panel, 0);
    
    // ─── Card Style (floating cards) ───
    lv_style_init(&style_card);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_card, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_all(&style_card, SHIELD_SPACE_MD);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_card, 8);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_card, lv_color_black());
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_card, LV_OPA_30);
    
    // ─── Primary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_primary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_primary, 0);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    lv_style_set_shadow_width(&style_btn_primary, 4);
    lv_style_set_shadow_color(&style_btn_primary, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT);
    lv_style_set_shadow_opa(&style_btn_primary, LV_OPA_40);
    
    // ─── Secondary Button Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_btn_secondary);
    lv_style_set_bg_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY);
    lv_style_set_bg_opa(&style_btn_secondary, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_border_width(&style_btn_secondary, 1);
    lv_style_set_border_color(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT);
    lv_style_set_radius(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD);
    lv_style_set_pad_hor(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_LG);
    lv_style_set_pad_ver(&style_btn_secondary, SHIELD_SPACE_SM);
    
    // ─── Title Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_title);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_title, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    // ─── Body Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_body);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_body, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_body, &lv_font_montserrat_14);
    
    // ─── Muted Label Style ───
    lv_style_init(&style_label_muted);
    lv_style_set_text_color(&style_label_muted, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED);
    lv_style_set_text_font(&style_label_muted, &lv_font_montserrat_14);  // Using available font
    
    styles_initialized = true;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STYLE APPLICATION FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_style_panel(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_panel, 0);
}

void shield_style_card(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_card, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_primary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_primary, 0);
}

void shield_style_btn_secondary(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_btn_secondary, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_title(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_title, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_body(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_body, 0);
}

void shield_style_label_muted(lv_obj_t *obj) {
    lv_obj_add_style(obj, &style_label_muted, 0);
}

void shield_style_progress_bar(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_MAIN);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, SHIELD_RADIUS_FULL, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
}

void shield_style_status_indicator(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color) {
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, 8, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, LV_OPA_60, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SACRED GEOMETRY DRAWING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_draw_tetrahedron(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing is different - simplified for compatibility
    // This is a placeholder - real drawing would use canvas buffer directly
    (void)canvas;
    (void)cx;
    (void)cy;
    (void)radius;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_hex_grid(lv_obj_t *canvas, int x, int y, int w, int h, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing placeholder
    (void)canvas;
    (void)x;
    (void)y;
    (void)w;
    (void)h;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_golden_spiral(lv_obj_t *canvas, int cx, int cy, int radius, lv_color_t color) {
    // LVGL 8.x: Canvas drawing placeholder
    (void)canvas;
    (void)cx;
    (void)cy;
    (void)radius;
    (void)color;
    // TODO: Implement using LVGL 8.x canvas API if needed
}

void shield_draw_glow(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_color_t color, uint8_t intensity) {
    uint8_t shadow_width = 4 + (intensity * 12 / 255);
    uint8_t shadow_opa = LV_OPA_20 + (intensity * (LV_OPA_80 - LV_OPA_20) / 255);
    
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(obj, shadow_width, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_color(obj, color, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_shadow_opa(obj, shadow_opa, 0);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ANIMATIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void anim_opacity_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa((lv_obj_t *)var, (lv_opa_t)v, 0);
}

static void anim_x_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_x((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

static void anim_y_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_set_y((lv_obj_t *)var, v);
}

void shield_anim_fade_in(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_obj_set_style_opa(obj, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_time(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_fade_out(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t duration) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_set_time(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_pulse(lv_obj_t *obj, uint32_t period) {
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_60, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_opacity_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, period / 2);
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}

void shield_anim_slide_in(lv_obj_t *obj, lv_dir_t dir, uint32_t duration) {
    int32_t start_x = lv_obj_get_x(obj);
    int32_t start_y = lv_obj_get_y(obj);
    int32_t offset = 50;
    
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, obj);
    lv_anim_set_time(&a, duration);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_out);
    
    if (dir == LV_DIR_LEFT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x + offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_RIGHT) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_x - offset, start_x);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_x_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_TOP) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y + offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    } else if (dir == LV_DIR_BOTTOM) {
        lv_anim_set_values(&a, start_y - offset, start_y);
        lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, anim_y_cb);
    }
    
    lv_anim_start(&a);
}
```
