// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void voltage_slider_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *slider = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int32_t val = lv_slider_get_value(slider);
    g_shield_state.voltage = (uint8_t)val;
    if (voltage_change_cb) voltage_change_cb(val);
}

static void spoons_slider_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *slider = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int32_t val = lv_slider_get_value(slider);
    g_shield_state.spoons = (uint8_t)val;
    if (spoons_change_cb) spoons_change_cb(val);
}

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_settings(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(screen, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(screen, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, LV_SYMBOL_SETTINGS " SETTINGS");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
    
    // Voltage setting
    lv_obj_t *volt_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(volt_card, LV_PCT(100), 70);
    shield_style_card(volt_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(volt_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_lbl = lv_label_create(volt_card);
    lv_label_set_text(volt_lbl, "Voltage Level");
    lv_obj_align(volt_lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(volt_lbl, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_slider = lv_slider_create(volt_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(volt_slider, LV_PCT(90), 10);
    lv_obj_align(volt_slider, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -5);
    lv_slider_set_range(volt_slider, 1, 10);
    lv_slider_set_value(volt_slider, g_shield_state.voltage, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, LV_PART_KNOB);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(volt_slider, voltage_slider_cb, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
    
    // Spoons setting
    lv_obj_t *spoon_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoon_card, LV_PCT(100), 70);
    shield_style_card(spoon_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(spoon_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoon_lbl = lv_label_create(spoon_card);
    lv_label_set_text(spoon_lbl, "Spoon Budget");
    lv_obj_align(spoon_lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(spoon_lbl, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoon_slider = lv_slider_create(spoon_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoon_slider, LV_PCT(90), 10);
    lv_obj_align(spoon_slider, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -5);
    lv_slider_set_range(spoon_slider, 0, 12);
    lv_slider_set_value(spoon_slider, g_shield_state.spoons, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, LV_PART_KNOB);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(spoon_slider, spoons_slider_cb, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
    
    // Node ID display
    lv_obj_t *node_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_card, LV_PCT(100), 50);
    shield_style_card(node_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *node_lbl = lv_label_create(node_card);
    char node_str[64];
    snprintf(node_str, sizeof(node_str), "Node: %s (0x%02X)", g_shield_state.callsign, g_shield_state.node_id);
    lv_label_set_text(node_lbl, node_str);
    lv_obj_center(node_lbl);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(node_lbl, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DEV SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_dev(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_SM, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 44, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 60, 0);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(screen, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(screen, 4, 0);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, "🔧 DEV DIAGNOSTICS");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_CYAN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Telemetry output (monospace style)
    const char *telemetry_fmt = 
        "[ARCHITECT] F=750 H=266K S=0\n"
        "BAT=%d%% V=%d SPOONS=%d\n"
        "[ACCEL] X=%d Y=%d Z=%d\n"
        "[TOUCH] %s X=%d Y=%d\n"
        "[WIFI] %s RSSI=%ddBm\n"
        "[MODE] %s";
    
    lv_obj_t *telem = lv_label_create(screen);
    char buf[256];
    snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), telemetry_fmt,
        g_shield_state.battery,
        g_shield_state.voltage,
        g_shield_state.spoons,
        g_shield_state.accel_x,
        g_shield_state.accel_y,
        g_shield_state.accel_z,
        g_shield_state.touch_active ? "ACTIVE" : "IDLE",
        g_shield_state.touch_x,
        g_shield_state.touch_y,
        g_shield_state.wifi_connected ? "ON" : "OFF",
        g_shield_state.wifi_rssi,
        get_mode_text(g_shield_state.mode)
    );
    lv_label_set_text(telem, buf);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(telem, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(telem, &lv_font_montserrat_12, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WIFI SCREEN (placeholder)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_wifi(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, LV_SYMBOL_WIFI " WIFI SETUP");
    lv_obj_align(title, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *status = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(status, g_shield_state.wifi_connected ? "✓ Connected" : "○ Disconnected");
    lv_obj_align(status, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(status, g_shield_state.wifi_connected ? SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN : SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(status, &lv_font_montserrat_16, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MAIN UI FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOUCH INPUT DEVICE (LVGL Integration)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void touchpad_read_cb(lv_indev_drv_t *indev_drv, lv_indev_data_t *data) {
    static lv_coord_t last_x = 0;
    static lv_coord_t last_y = 0;
    static int error_count = 0;
    static int touch_count = 0;
    
    uint16_t tx, ty;
    esp_err_t ret = bsp_touch_read(&tx, &ty);
    
    if (ret == ESP_OK) {
        // Touch detected!
        touch_count++;
        
        // GT911 reports 480x320 (landscape), Display is 320x480 (portrait)
        // Try mapping: swap X/Y since orientations differ
        last_x = (lv_coord_t)ty;           // GT911 Y (0-319) -> Display X (0-319)
        last_y = (lv_coord_t)(479 - tx);   // GT911 X (0-479) -> Display Y (0-479, inverted)
        
        // Clamp to display bounds
        if (last_x < 0) last_x = 0;
        if (last_x > 319) last_x = 319;
        if (last_y < 0) last_y = 0;
        if (last_y > 479) last_y = 479;
        
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_PR;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        
        // Update global state
        g_shield_state.touch_active = true;
        g_shield_state.touch_x = tx;
        g_shield_state.touch_y = ty;
        
        // Debug: log touches (first 10, then every 50th)
        if (touch_count <= 10 || (touch_count % 50 == 0)) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "[TOUCH] #%d Raw:(%d,%d) Mapped:(%d,%d)", touch_count, tx, ty, last_x, last_y);
        }
    } else if (ret == ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
        // No touch - normal
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_REL;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        g_shield_state.touch_active = false;
    } else {
        // Error reading touch
        error_count++;
        if (error_count <= 5 || (error_count % 100 == 0)) {
            ESP_LOGW(TAG, "[TOUCH] Read error: %s (count: %d)", esp_err_to_name(ret), error_count);
        }
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_REL;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        g_shield_state.touch_active = false;
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BOOT SCREEN (OPUS-style)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void show_boot_screen(void) {
    lv_obj_t *boot_scr = lv_obj_create(NULL);
    lv_obj_set_size(boot_scr, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(boot_scr, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(boot_scr, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(boot_scr, 0, 0);
    lv_scr_load(boot_scr);
    
    // OPUS title
    lv_obj_t *opus_label = lv_label_create(boot_scr);
    lv_label_set_text(opus_label, "OPUS");
    lv_obj_center(opus_label);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(opus_label, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(opus_label, &lv_font_montserrat_48, 0);
    
    // Subtitle
    lv_obj_t *subtitle = lv_label_create(boot_scr);
    lv_label_set_text(subtitle, "The Flow State Interface");
    lv_obj_align(subtitle, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(subtitle, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(subtitle, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Animate fade in
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, opus_label);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_time(&a, 1000);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, (lv_anim_exec_xcb_t)lv_obj_set_style_opa);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    // Process LVGL for boot animation (show for ~2 seconds)
    for (int i = 0; i < 120; i++) {
        lv_timer_handler();
        vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(16));  // ~60fps
    }
    
    // Fade out
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 60; i++) {
        lv_timer_handler();
        vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(16));
    }
    
    lv_obj_del(boot_scr);
}

void shield_ui_init(void) {
    // Initialize theme
    shield_theme_init();
    
    // Register touch input device with LVGL
    static lv_indev_drv_t indev_drv;
    lv_indev_drv_init(&indev_drv);
    indev_drv.type = LV_INDEV_TYPE_POINTER;
    indev_drv.read_cb = touchpad_read_cb;
    lv_indev_t *touch_indev = lv_indev_drv_register(&indev_drv);
    if (touch_indev) {
        ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✓ Touch input device registered with LVGL");
        
        // Test touch initialization
        uint16_t test_x, test_y;
        esp_err_t test_ret = bsp_touch_read(&test_x, &test_y);
        if (test_ret == ESP_OK) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✓ Touch hardware responding (test read: %d, %d)", test_x, test_y);
        } else if (test_ret == ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✓ Touch hardware ready (no touch detected - normal)");
        } else {
            ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠ Touch hardware test failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(test_ret));
        }
    } else {
        ESP_LOGE(TAG, "✗ Failed to register touch input device!");
    }
    
    // Show boot screen
    show_boot_screen();
    
    // Get active screen
    lv_obj_t *scr = lv_scr_act();
    
    // Set screen background
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(scr, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(scr, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    
    // Create main container
    scr_container = lv_obj_create(scr);
    lv_obj_set_size(scr_container, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(scr_container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(scr_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(scr_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(scr_container, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Create header and nav
    create_header_bar(scr_container);
    create_nav_bar(scr_container);
    
    // Create default screen
    current_screen = shield_ui_create_dashboard(scr_container);
    
    // Initial update
    shield_ui_update();
}

void shield_ui_update(void) {
    // Update time
    if (lbl_time) {
        char time_str[8];
        snprintf(time_str, sizeof(time_str), "%02d:%02d", g_shield_state.hour, g_shield_state.minute);
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_time, time_str);
    }
    
    // Update callsign
    if (lbl_callsign) {
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_callsign, g_shield_state.callsign);
    }
    
    // Update battery
    if (obj_battery) {
        int width = (g_shield_state.battery * 26) / 100;
        lv_obj_set_width(obj_battery, width > 0 ? width : 1);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj_battery, get_battery_color(g_shield_state.battery), 0);
    }
    
    // Update voltage
    if (bar_voltage) {
        lv_bar_set_value(bar_voltage, g_shield_state.voltage, LV_ANIM_ON);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bar_voltage, get_voltage_color(g_shield_state.voltage), LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    }
    if (lbl_voltage) {
        char v[4];
        snprintf(v, sizeof(v), "%d", g_shield_state.voltage);
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_voltage, v);
    }
    
    // Update spoons (visual)
    if (obj_spoons) {
        char spoon_str[64] = "";
        int count = g_shield_state.spoons;
        for (int i = 0; i < count && i < 12; i++) {
            strcat(spoon_str, "🥄");
            if ((i + 1) % 6 == 0 && i < count - 1) strcat(spoon_str, "\n");
        }
        if (count == 0) strcpy(spoon_str, "⚠️");
        lv_label_set_text(obj_spoons, spoon_str);
    }
    
    // Update mode
    if (lbl_mode) {
        char mode_str[32];
        snprintf(mode_str, sizeof(mode_str), "◉ %s", get_mode_text(g_shield_state.mode));
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_mode, mode_str);
        
        lv_color_t mode_color = SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN;
        if (g_shield_state.mode == MODE_GROUNDING) mode_color = SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW;
        else if (g_shield_state.mode == MODE_BREATHING) mode_color = SHIELD_CYAN;
        else if (g_shield_state.mode == MODE_HEAVY_WORK) mode_color = SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE;
        lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_mode, mode_color, 0);
    }
}

void shield_ui_goto_screen(shield_screen_t screen) {
    if (current_screen) {
        lv_obj_delete(current_screen);
        current_screen = NULL;
    }
    
    g_shield_state.screen = screen;
    
    switch (screen) {
        case SCREEN_DASHBOARD:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_dashboard(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_SETTINGS:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_settings(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_SAFE:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_safe(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_WIFI:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_wifi(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_DEV:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_dev(scr_container);
            break;
        default:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_dashboard(scr_container);
            break;
    }
    
    // Animate in
    if (current_screen) {
        shield_anim_fade_in(current_screen, SHIELD_ANIM_FAST);
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CALLBACK REGISTRATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_ui_on_mode_change(shield_mode_cb_t cb) {
    mode_change_cb = cb;
}

void shield_ui_on_voltage_change(shield_voltage_cb_t cb) {
    voltage_change_cb = cb;
}

void shield_ui_on_spoons_change(shield_spoons_cb_t cb) {
    spoons_change_cb = cb;
}

```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD UI - Implementation                                               ║
 * ║   Complete User Interface for Phenix Navigator                             ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_ui.h"
#include "shield_theme.h"
#include "bsp_driver.h"
#include "esp_log.h"
#include "freertos/FreeRTOS.h"
#include "freertos/task.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <math.h>

static const char *TAG = "SHIELD_UI";

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// GLOBAL STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

shield_state_t g_shield_state = {
    .node_id = 0x01,
    .callsign = "ARCHITECT",
    .name = "Navigator",
    .voltage = 5,
    .spoons = 10,
    .mode = MODE_NORMAL,
    .screen = SCREEN_DASHBOARD,
    .battery = 100,
    .mesh_connected = false,
    .wifi_connected = false,
    .wifi_rssi = -70,
    .accel_x = 0,
    .accel_y = 0,
    .accel_z = -8192,
    .touch_active = false,
    .touch_x = 0,
    .touch_y = 0,
    .hour = 12,
    .minute = 0,
    .second = 0,
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC REFERENCES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_obj_t *scr_container = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *current_screen = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *header_bar = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *nav_bar = NULL;

// Dashboard widgets
static lv_obj_t *lbl_time = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *lbl_callsign = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *bar_voltage = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *lbl_voltage = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *obj_spoons = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *obj_battery = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *obj_k4 = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *lbl_mode = NULL;

// Callbacks
static shield_mode_cb_t mode_change_cb = NULL;
static shield_voltage_cb_t voltage_change_cb = NULL;
static shield_spoons_cb_t spoons_change_cb = NULL;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HELPER FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_color_t get_voltage_color(uint8_t voltage) {
    if (voltage <= 3) return SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN;
    if (voltage <= 6) return SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW;
    if (voltage <= 8) return SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE;
    return SHIELD_STATUS_RED;
}

static lv_color_t get_battery_color(uint8_t battery) {
    if (battery > 60) return SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN;
    if (battery > 30) return SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW;
    if (battery > 10) return SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE;
    return SHIELD_STATUS_RED;
}

static const char* get_mode_text(shield_mode_t mode) {
    switch (mode) {
        case MODE_GROUNDING:  return "GROUNDING";
        case MODE_BREATHING:  return "BREATHING";
        case MODE_HEAVY_WORK: return "HEAVY WORK";
        case MODE_LANGUAGE:   return "LANGUAGE";
        case MODE_DELTA:      return "DELTA";
        default:              return "NORMAL";
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HEADER BAR (top status strip)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void create_header_bar(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    header_bar = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(header_bar, LV_PCT(100), 40);
    lv_obj_align(header_bar, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(header_bar, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(header_bar, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(header_bar, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_hor(header_bar, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_ver(header_bar, SHIELD_SPACE_XS, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(header_bar, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(header_bar, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(header_bar, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    
    // Time
    lbl_time = lv_label_create(header_bar);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_time, "12:00");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_time, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_time, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Callsign
    lbl_callsign = lv_label_create(header_bar);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_callsign, "ARCHITECT");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_callsign, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_callsign, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Battery container
    lv_obj_t *battery_cont = lv_obj_create(header_bar);
    lv_obj_set_size(battery_cont, 60, 24);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(battery_cont, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(battery_cont, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(battery_cont, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(battery_cont, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Battery icon outline
    lv_obj_t *bat_outline = lv_obj_create(battery_cont);
    lv_obj_set_size(bat_outline, 30, 16);
    lv_obj_align(bat_outline, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bat_outline, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bat_outline, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bat_outline, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(bat_outline, 2, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(bat_outline, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Battery fill
    obj_battery = lv_obj_create(bat_outline);
    lv_obj_set_size(obj_battery, 26, 12);
    lv_obj_align(obj_battery, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj_battery, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj_battery, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(obj_battery, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj_battery, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(obj_battery, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Battery tip
    lv_obj_t *bat_tip = lv_obj_create(battery_cont);
    lv_obj_set_size(bat_tip, 3, 8);
    lv_obj_align(bat_tip, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 31, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bat_tip, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bat_tip, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(bat_tip, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(bat_tip, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NAVIGATION BAR (bottom)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void nav_btn_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *btn = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int screen_idx = (int)(intptr_t)lv_obj_get_user_data(btn);
    shield_ui_goto_screen((shield_screen_t)screen_idx);
}

static void create_nav_bar(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    nav_bar = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(nav_bar, LV_PCT(100), 56);
    lv_obj_align(nav_bar, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(nav_bar, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(nav_bar, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(nav_bar, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_side(nav_bar, LV_BORDER_SIDE_TOP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(nav_bar, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(nav_bar, SHIELD_SPACE_XS, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(nav_bar, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(nav_bar, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(nav_bar, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_EVENLY, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    
    // Nav button definitions
    const char *icons[] = { LV_SYMBOL_HOME, LV_SYMBOL_SETTINGS, "💚", LV_SYMBOL_WIFI, LV_SYMBOL_EYE_OPEN };
    const char *labels[] = { "Home", "Set", "Safe", "WiFi", "Dev" };
    shield_screen_t screens[] = { SCREEN_DASHBOARD, SCREEN_SETTINGS, SCREEN_SAFE, SCREEN_WIFI, SCREEN_DEV };
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        lv_obj_t *btn = lv_btn_create(nav_bar);
        lv_obj_set_size(btn, 56, 44);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(btn, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_border_width(btn, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(btn, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_set_user_data(btn, (void*)(intptr_t)screens[i]);
        lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn, nav_btn_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
        
        // Hover style
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_STATE_PRESSED);
        
        // Icon + Label container
        lv_obj_t *cont = lv_obj_create(btn);
        lv_obj_set_size(cont, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(cont, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_border_width(cont, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(cont, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_clear_flag(cont, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
        lv_obj_set_flex_flow(cont, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
        lv_obj_set_flex_align(cont, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
        
        lv_obj_t *icon = lv_label_create(cont);
        lv_label_set_text(icon, icons[i]);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_color(icon, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_font(icon, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
        
        lv_obj_t *label = lv_label_create(cont);
        lv_label_set_text(label, labels[i]);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_color(label, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_font(label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_dashboard(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);  // Below header
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);  // Above nav
    lv_obj_clear_flag(screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // === CENTER: Tetrahedron K4 Visualization ===
    lv_obj_t *k4_container = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(k4_container, 180, 180);
    lv_obj_align(k4_container, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -20);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(k4_container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(k4_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(k4_container, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Draw tetrahedron edges (K4 complete graph)
    // Top vertex
    lv_obj_t *node_top = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_top, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_top, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 10);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_top, SHIELD_GOLD);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_top, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Bottom left
    lv_obj_t *node_bl = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_bl, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_bl, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_LEFT, 20, -20);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_bl, lv_color_hex(0xFF6B6B));
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_bl, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Bottom right
    lv_obj_t *node_br = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_br, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_br, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_RIGHT, -20, -20);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_br, lv_color_hex(0x4ECDC4));
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_br, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Center
    lv_obj_t *node_center = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_center, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_center, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 20);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_center, lv_color_hex(0xA78BFA));
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_center, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Connecting lines (drawn with line objects)
    // Note: lv_point_precise_t is LVGL 9.x, using lv_point_t for 8.x
    static lv_point_t line_points[2];
    (void)line_points;  // Unused for now
    
    // Add pulsing animation to nodes
    shield_anim_pulse(node_top, 2000);
    
    obj_k4 = k4_container;
    
    // === TOP LEFT: Voltage Gauge ===
    lv_obj_t *voltage_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(voltage_card, 140, 80);
    lv_obj_align(voltage_card, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    shield_style_card(voltage_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(voltage_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_label = lv_label_create(voltage_card);
    lv_label_set_text(volt_label, "VOLTAGE");
    lv_obj_align(volt_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(volt_label, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(volt_label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    lbl_voltage = lv_label_create(voltage_card);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_voltage, "5");
    lv_obj_align(lbl_voltage, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 5);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_voltage, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_voltage, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    bar_voltage = lv_bar_create(voltage_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(bar_voltage, 120, 8);
    lv_obj_align(bar_voltage, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_bar_set_range(bar_voltage, 1, 10);
    lv_bar_set_value(bar_voltage, 5, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    shield_style_progress_bar(bar_voltage, SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW);
    
    // === TOP RIGHT: Spoons Counter ===
    lv_obj_t *spoons_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoons_card, 140, 80);
    lv_obj_align(spoons_card, LV_ALIGN_TOP_RIGHT, 0, 0);
    shield_style_card(spoons_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(spoons_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoons_label = lv_label_create(spoons_card);
    lv_label_set_text(spoons_label, "SPOONS");
    lv_obj_align(spoons_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(spoons_label, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(spoons_label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    obj_spoons = lv_label_create(spoons_card);
    lv_label_set_text(obj_spoons, "🥄🥄🥄🥄🥄\n🥄🥄🥄🥄🥄");
    lv_obj_align(obj_spoons, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 8);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(obj_spoons, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // === BOTTOM: Mode Indicator ===
    lv_obj_t *mode_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(mode_card, LV_PCT(100), 50);
    lv_obj_align(mode_card, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(mode_card, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(mode_card, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(mode_card, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(mode_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(mode_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_LG, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(mode_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lbl_mode = lv_label_create(mode_card);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_mode, "◉ NORMAL");
    lv_obj_center(lbl_mode);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_mode, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_mode, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// YOU ARE SAFE SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void breathing_anim_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_t *circle = (lv_obj_t *)var;
    int size = 80 + (v * 80 / 100);  // Scale from 80 to 160
    lv_obj_set_size(circle, size, size);
    lv_obj_center(circle);
}

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_safe(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, "💚 YOU ARE SAFE");
    lv_obj_align(title, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
    
    // Breathing circle
    lv_obj_t *breathe_container = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(breathe_container, 200, 200);
    lv_obj_align(breathe_container, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -10);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(breathe_container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(breathe_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(breathe_container, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *breathe_circle = lv_obj_create(breathe_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(breathe_circle, 100, 100);
    lv_obj_center(breathe_circle);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(breathe_circle, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(breathe_circle, LV_OPA_40, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(breathe_circle, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(breathe_circle, 2, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(breathe_circle, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(breathe_circle, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Breathing animation (4-7-8 pattern)
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, breathe_circle);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, 0, 100);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, 4000);  // 4 second inhale
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, breathing_anim_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, 8000);  // 8 second exhale
    lv_anim_set_playback_delay(&a, 7000);     // 7 second hold
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    // Breathing instruction
    lv_obj_t *instr = lv_label_create(breathe_container);
    lv_label_set_text(instr, "BREATHE");
    lv_obj_center(instr);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(instr, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(instr, &lv_font_montserrat_16, 0);
    
    // Reassurance text
    lv_obj_t *reassure = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(reassure, "Right now, your only job is to exist.\nThe Shield is handling the voltage.");
    lv_label_set_long_mode(reassure, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
    lv_obj_set_width(reassure, LV_PCT(90));
    lv_obj_align(reassure, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -10);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(reassure, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(reassure, &lv_font_montserrat_12, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_align(reassure, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SETTINGS SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void voltage_slider_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *slider = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int32_t val = lv_slider_get_value(slider);
    g_shield_state.voltage = (uint8_t)val;
    if (voltage_change_cb) voltage_change_cb(val);
}

static void spoons_slider_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *slider = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int32_t val = lv_slider_get_value(slider);
    g_shield_state.spoons = (uint8_t)val;
    if (spoons_change_cb) spoons_change_cb(val);
}

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_settings(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(screen, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(screen, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, LV_SYMBOL_SETTINGS " SETTINGS");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_20, 0);
    
    // Voltage setting
    lv_obj_t *volt_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(volt_card, LV_PCT(100), 70);
    shield_style_card(volt_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(volt_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_lbl = lv_label_create(volt_card);
    lv_label_set_text(volt_lbl, "Voltage Level");
    lv_obj_align(volt_lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(volt_lbl, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_slider = lv_slider_create(volt_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(volt_slider, LV_PCT(90), 10);
    lv_obj_align(volt_slider, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -5);
    lv_slider_set_range(volt_slider, 1, 10);
    lv_slider_set_value(volt_slider, g_shield_state.voltage, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, LV_PART_KNOB);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(volt_slider, voltage_slider_cb, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
    
    // Spoons setting
    lv_obj_t *spoon_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoon_card, LV_PCT(100), 70);
    shield_style_card(spoon_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(spoon_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoon_lbl = lv_label_create(spoon_card);
    lv_label_set_text(spoon_lbl, "Spoon Budget");
    lv_obj_align(spoon_lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(spoon_lbl, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoon_slider = lv_slider_create(spoon_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoon_slider, LV_PCT(90), 10);
    lv_obj_align(spoon_slider, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -5);
    lv_slider_set_range(spoon_slider, 0, 12);
    lv_slider_set_value(spoon_slider, g_shield_state.spoons, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, LV_PART_KNOB);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(spoon_slider, spoons_slider_cb, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
    
    // Node ID display
    lv_obj_t *node_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_card, LV_PCT(100), 50);
    shield_style_card(node_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *node_lbl = lv_label_create(node_card);
    char node_str[64];
    snprintf(node_str, sizeof(node_str), "Node: %s (0x%02X)", g_shield_state.callsign, g_shield_state.node_id);
    lv_label_set_text(node_lbl, node_str);
    lv_obj_center(node_lbl);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(node_lbl, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DEV SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_dev(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_SM, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 44, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 60, 0);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(screen, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(screen, 4, 0);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, "🔧 DEV DIAGNOSTICS");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_CYAN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Telemetry output (monospace style)
    const char *telemetry_fmt = 
        "[ARCHITECT] F=750 H=266K S=0\n"
        "BAT=%d%% V=%d SPOONS=%d\n"
        "[ACCEL] X=%d Y=%d Z=%d\n"
        "[TOUCH] %s X=%d Y=%d\n"
        "[WIFI] %s RSSI=%ddBm\n"
        "[MODE] %s";
    
    lv_obj_t *telem = lv_label_create(screen);
    char buf[256];
    snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), telemetry_fmt,
        g_shield_state.battery,
        g_shield_state.voltage,
        g_shield_state.spoons,
        g_shield_state.accel_x,
        g_shield_state.accel_y,
        g_shield_state.accel_z,
        g_shield_state.touch_active ? "ACTIVE" : "IDLE",
        g_shield_state.touch_x,
        g_shield_state.touch_y,
        g_shield_state.wifi_connected ? "ON" : "OFF",
        g_shield_state.wifi_rssi,
        get_mode_text(g_shield_state.mode)
    );
    lv_label_set_text(telem, buf);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(telem, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(telem, &lv_font_montserrat_12, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(status, &lv_font_montserrat_16, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MAIN UI FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOUCH INPUT DEVICE (LVGL Integration)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void touchpad_read_cb(lv_indev_drv_t *indev_drv, lv_indev_data_t *data) {
    static lv_coord_t last_x = 0;
    static lv_coord_t last_y = 0;
    static int error_count = 0;
    static int touch_count = 0;
    
    uint16_t tx, ty;
    esp_err_t ret = bsp_touch_read(&tx, &ty);
    
    if (ret == ESP_OK) {
        // Touch detected!
        touch_count++;
        
        // GT911 reports 480x320 (landscape), Display is 320x480 (portrait)
        // Try mapping: swap X/Y since orientations differ
        last_x = (lv_coord_t)ty;           // GT911 Y (0-319) -> Display X (0-319)
        last_y = (lv_coord_t)(479 - tx);   // GT911 X (0-479) -> Display Y (0-479, inverted)
        
        // Clamp to display bounds
        if (last_x < 0) last_x = 0;
        if (last_x > 319) last_x = 319;
        if (last_y < 0) last_y = 0;
        if (last_y > 479) last_y = 479;
        
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_PR;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        
        // Update global state
        g_shield_state.touch_active = true;
        g_shield_state.touch_x = tx;
        g_shield_state.touch_y = ty;
        
        // Debug: log touches (first 10, then every 50th)
        if (touch_count <= 10 || (touch_count % 50 == 0)) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "[TOUCH] #%d Raw:(%d,%d) Mapped:(%d,%d)", touch_count, tx, ty, last_x, last_y);
        }
    } else if (ret == ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
        // No touch - normal
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_REL;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        g_shield_state.touch_active = false;
    } else {
        // Error reading touch
        error_count++;
        if (error_count <= 5 || (error_count % 100 == 0)) {
            ESP_LOGW(TAG, "[TOUCH] Read error: %s (count: %d)", esp_err_to_name(ret), error_count);
        }
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_REL;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        g_shield_state.touch_active = false;
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BOOT SCREEN (OPUS-style)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void show_boot_screen(void) {
    lv_obj_t *boot_scr = lv_obj_create(NULL);
    lv_obj_set_size(boot_scr, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(boot_scr, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(boot_scr, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(boot_scr, 0, 0);
    lv_scr_load(boot_scr);
    
    // OPUS title
    lv_obj_t *opus_label = lv_label_create(boot_scr);
    lv_label_set_text(opus_label, "OPUS");
    lv_obj_center(opus_label);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(opus_label, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(opus_label, &lv_font_montserrat_48, 0);
    
    // Subtitle
    lv_obj_t *subtitle = lv_label_create(boot_scr);
    lv_label_set_text(subtitle, "The Flow State Interface");
    lv_obj_align(subtitle, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(subtitle, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(subtitle, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Animate fade in
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, opus_label);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_time(&a, 1000);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, (lv_anim_exec_xcb_t)lv_obj_set_style_opa);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    // Process LVGL for boot animation (show for ~2 seconds)
    for (int i = 0; i < 120; i++) {
        lv_timer_handler();
        vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(16));  // ~60fps
    }
    
    // Fade out
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_COVER, LV_OPA_TRANSP);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 60; i++) {
        lv_timer_handler();
        vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(16));
    }
    
    lv_obj_del(boot_scr);
}

void shield_ui_init(void) {
    // Initialize theme
    shield_theme_init();
    
    // Register touch input device with LVGL
    static lv_indev_drv_t indev_drv;
    lv_indev_drv_init(&indev_drv);
    indev_drv.type = LV_INDEV_TYPE_POINTER;
    indev_drv.read_cb = touchpad_read_cb;
    lv_indev_t *touch_indev = lv_indev_drv_register(&indev_drv);
    if (touch_indev) {
        ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✓ Touch input device registered with LVGL");
        
        // Test touch initialization
        uint16_t test_x, test_y;
        esp_err_t test_ret = bsp_touch_read(&test_x, &test_y);
        if (test_ret == ESP_OK) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✓ Touch hardware responding (test read: %d, %d)", test_x, test_y);
        } else if (test_ret == ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "✓ Touch hardware ready (no touch detected - normal)");
        } else {
            ESP_LOGW(TAG, "⚠ Touch hardware test failed: %s", esp_err_to_name(test_ret));
        }
    } else {
        ESP_LOGE(TAG, "✗ Failed to register touch input device!");
    }
    
    // Show boot screen
    show_boot_screen();
    
    // Get active screen
    lv_obj_t *scr = lv_scr_act();
    
    // Set screen background
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(scr, SHIELD_BG_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(scr, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    
    // Create main container
    scr_container = lv_obj_create(scr);
    lv_obj_set_size(scr_container, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(scr_container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(scr_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(scr_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(scr_container, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Create header and nav
    create_header_bar(scr_container);
    create_nav_bar(scr_container);
    
    // Create default screen
    current_screen = shield_ui_create_dashboard(scr_container);
    
    // Initial update
    shield_ui_update();
}

void shield_ui_update(void) {
    // Update time
    if (lbl_time) {
        char time_str[8];
        snprintf(time_str, sizeof(time_str), "%02d:%02d", g_shield_state.hour, g_shield_state.minute);
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_time, time_str);
    }
    
    // Update callsign
    if (lbl_callsign) {
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_callsign, g_shield_state.callsign);
    }
    
    // Update battery
    if (obj_battery) {
        int width = (g_shield_state.battery * 26) / 100;
        lv_obj_set_width(obj_battery, width > 0 ? width : 1);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj_battery, get_battery_color(g_shield_state.battery), 0);
    }
    
    // Update voltage
    if (bar_voltage) {
        lv_bar_set_value(bar_voltage, g_shield_state.voltage, LV_ANIM_ON);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bar_voltage, get_voltage_color(g_shield_state.voltage), LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    }
    if (lbl_voltage) {
        char v[4];
        snprintf(v, sizeof(v), "%d", g_shield_state.voltage);
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_voltage, v);
    }
    
    // Update spoons (visual)
    if (obj_spoons) {
        char spoon_str[64] = "";
        int count = g_shield_state.spoons;
        for (int i = 0; i < count && i < 12; i++) {
            strcat(spoon_str, "🥄");
            if ((i + 1) % 6 == 0 && i < count - 1) strcat(spoon_str, "\n");
        }
        if (count == 0) strcpy(spoon_str, "⚠️");
        lv_label_set_text(obj_spoons, spoon_str);
    }
    
    // Update mode
    if (lbl_mode) {
        char mode_str[32];
        snprintf(mode_str, sizeof(mode_str), "◉ %s", get_mode_text(g_shield_state.mode));
        lv_label_set_text(lbl_mode, mode_str);
        
        lv_color_t mode_color = SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN;
        if (g_shield_state.mode == MODE_GROUNDING) mode_color = SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW;
        else if (g_shield_state.mode == MODE_BREATHING) mode_color = SHIELD_CYAN;
        else if (g_shield_state.mode == MODE_HEAVY_WORK) mode_color = SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE;
        lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_mode, mode_color, 0);
    }
}

void shield_ui_goto_screen(shield_screen_t screen) {
    if (current_screen) {
        lv_obj_delete(current_screen);
        current_screen = NULL;
    }
    
    g_shield_state.screen = screen;
    
    switch (screen) {
        case SCREEN_DASHBOARD:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_dashboard(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_SETTINGS:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_settings(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_SAFE:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_safe(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_WIFI:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_wifi(scr_container);
            break;
        case SCREEN_DEV:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_dev(scr_container);
            break;
        default:
            current_screen = shield_ui_create_dashboard(scr_container);
            break;
    }
    
    // Animate in
    if (current_screen) {
        shield_anim_fade_in(current_screen, SHIELD_ANIM_FAST);
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CALLBACK REGISTRATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

void shield_ui_on_mode_change(shield_mode_cb_t cb) {
    mode_change_cb = cb;
}

void shield_ui_on_voltage_change(shield_voltage_cb_t cb) {
    voltage_change_cb = cb;
}

void shield_ui_on_spoons_change(shield_spoons_cb_t cb) {
    spoons_change_cb = cb;
}

```

```c
/**
 * ╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
 * ║   SHIELD UI - Implementation                                               ║
 * ║   Complete User Interface for Phenix Navigator                             ║
 * ╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝
 */

#include "shield_ui.h"
#include "shield_theme.h"
#include "bsp_driver.h"
#include "esp_log.h"
#include "freertos/FreeRTOS.h"
#include "freertos/task.h"
#include <stdio.h>
#include <string.h>
#include <math.h>

static const char *TAG = "SHIELD_UI";

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// GLOBAL STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

shield_state_t g_shield_state = {
    .node_id = 0x01,
    .callsign = "ARCHITECT",
    .name = "Navigator",
    .voltage = 5,
    .spoons = 10,
    .mode = MODE_NORMAL,
    .screen = SCREEN_DASHBOARD,
    .battery = 100,
    .mesh_connected = false,
    .wifi_connected = false,
    .wifi_rssi = -70,
    .accel_x = 0,
    .accel_y = 0,
    .accel_z = -8192,
    .touch_active = false,
    .touch_x = 0,
    .touch_y = 0,
    .hour = 12,
    .minute = 0,
    .second = 0,
};

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATIC REFERENCES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_obj_t *scr_container = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *current_screen = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *header_bar = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *nav_bar = NULL;

// Dashboard widgets
static lv_obj_t *lbl_time = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *lbl_callsign = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *bar_voltage = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *lbl_voltage = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *obj_spoons = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *obj_battery = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *obj_k4 = NULL;
static lv_obj_t *lbl_mode = NULL;

// Callbacks
static shield_mode_cb_t mode_change_cb = NULL;
static shield_voltage_cb_t voltage_change_cb = NULL;
static shield_spoons_cb_t spoons_change_cb = NULL;

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HELPER FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static lv_color_t get_voltage_color(uint8_t voltage) {
    if (voltage <= 3) return SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN;
    if (voltage <= 6) return SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW;
    if (voltage <= 8) return SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE;
    return SHIELD_STATUS_RED;
}

static lv_color_t get_battery_color(uint8_t battery) {
    if (battery > 60) return SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN;
    if (battery > 30) return SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW;
    if (battery > 10) return SHIELD_STATUS_ORANGE;
    return SHIELD_STATUS_RED;
}

static const char* get_mode_text(shield_mode_t mode) {
    switch (mode) {
        case MODE_GROUNDING:  return "GROUNDING";
        case MODE_BREATHING:  return "BREATHING";
        case MODE_HEAVY_WORK: return "HEAVY WORK";
        case MODE_LANGUAGE:   return "LANGUAGE";
        case MODE_DELTA:      return "DELTA";
        default:              return "NORMAL";
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HEADER BAR (top status strip)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void create_header_bar(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    header_bar = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(header_bar, LV_PCT(100), 40);
    lv_obj_align(header_bar, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(header_bar, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(header_bar, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(header_bar, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_hor(header_bar, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_ver(header_bar, SHIELD_SPACE_XS, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(header_bar, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(header_bar, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(header_bar, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_BETWEEN, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    
    // Time
    lbl_time = lv_label_create(header_bar);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_time, "12:00");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_time, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_time, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Callsign
    lbl_callsign = lv_label_create(header_bar);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_callsign, "ARCHITECT");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_callsign, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_callsign, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Battery container
    lv_obj_t *battery_cont = lv_obj_create(header_bar);
    lv_obj_set_size(battery_cont, 60, 24);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(battery_cont, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(battery_cont, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(battery_cont, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(battery_cont, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Battery icon outline
    lv_obj_t *bat_outline = lv_obj_create(battery_cont);
    lv_obj_set_size(bat_outline, 30, 16);
    lv_obj_align(bat_outline, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(bat_outline, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bat_outline, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(bat_outline, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(bat_outline, 2, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(bat_outline, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Battery fill
    obj_battery = lv_obj_create(bat_outline);
    lv_obj_set_size(obj_battery, 26, 12);
    lv_obj_align(obj_battery, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(obj_battery, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(obj_battery, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(obj_battery, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(obj_battery, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(obj_battery, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Battery tip
    lv_obj_t *bat_tip = lv_obj_create(battery_cont);
    lv_obj_set_size(bat_tip, 3, 8);
    lv_obj_align(bat_tip, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 31, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(bat_tip, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(bat_tip, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(bat_tip, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(bat_tip, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NAVIGATION BAR (bottom)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void nav_btn_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *btn = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int screen_idx = (int)(intptr_t)lv_obj_get_user_data(btn);
    shield_ui_goto_screen((shield_screen_t)screen_idx);
}

static void create_nav_bar(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    nav_bar = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(nav_bar, LV_PCT(100), 56);
    lv_obj_align(nav_bar, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(nav_bar, SHIELD_BG_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(nav_bar, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(nav_bar, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_side(nav_bar, LV_BORDER_SIDE_TOP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(nav_bar, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(nav_bar, SHIELD_SPACE_XS, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(nav_bar, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(nav_bar, LV_FLEX_FLOW_ROW);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(nav_bar, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_SPACE_EVENLY, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    
    // Nav button definitions
    const char *icons[] = { LV_SYMBOL_HOME, LV_SYMBOL_SETTINGS, "💚", LV_SYMBOL_WIFI, LV_SYMBOL_EYE_OPEN };
    const char *labels[] = { "Home", "Set", "Safe", "WiFi", "Dev" };
    shield_screen_t screens[] = { SCREEN_DASHBOARD, SCREEN_SETTINGS, SCREEN_SAFE, SCREEN_WIFI, SCREEN_DEV };
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
        lv_obj_t *btn = lv_btn_create(nav_bar);
        lv_obj_set_size(btn, 56, 44);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(btn, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_border_width(btn, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_radius(btn, SHIELD_RADIUS_MD, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_shadow_width(btn, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_set_user_data(btn, (void*)(intptr_t)screens[i]);
        lv_obj_add_event_cb(btn, nav_btn_cb, LV_EVENT_CLICKED, NULL);
        
        // Hover style
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(btn, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_STATE_PRESSED);
        
        // Icon + Label container
        lv_obj_t *cont = lv_obj_create(btn);
        lv_obj_set_size(cont, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
        lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(cont, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_border_width(cont, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(cont, 0, 0);
        lv_obj_clear_flag(cont, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE | LV_OBJ_FLAG_CLICKABLE);
        lv_obj_set_flex_flow(cont, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
        lv_obj_set_flex_align(cont, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
        
        lv_obj_t *icon = lv_label_create(cont);
        lv_label_set_text(icon, icons[i]);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_color(icon, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_font(icon, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
        
        lv_obj_t *label = lv_label_create(cont);
        lv_label_set_text(label, labels[i]);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_color(label, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
        lv_obj_set_style_text_font(label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_dashboard(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);  // Below header
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);  // Above nav
    lv_obj_clear_flag(screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // === CENTER: Tetrahedron K4 Visualization ===
    lv_obj_t *k4_container = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(k4_container, 180, 180);
    lv_obj_align(k4_container, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -20);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(k4_container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(k4_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(k4_container, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Draw tetrahedron edges (K4 complete graph)
    // Top vertex
    lv_obj_t *node_top = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_top, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_top, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 10);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_top, SHIELD_GOLD);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_top, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Bottom left
    lv_obj_t *node_bl = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_bl, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_bl, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_LEFT, 20, -20);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_bl, lv_color_hex(0xFF6B6B));
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_bl, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Bottom right
    lv_obj_t *node_br = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_br, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_br, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_RIGHT, -20, -20);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_br, lv_color_hex(0x4ECDC4));
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_br, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Center
    lv_obj_t *node_center = lv_obj_create(k4_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_center, 16, 16);
    lv_obj_align(node_center, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 20);
    shield_style_status_indicator(node_center, lv_color_hex(0xA78BFA));
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_center, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Connecting lines (drawn with line objects)
    // Note: lv_point_precise_t is LVGL 9.x, using lv_point_t for 8.x
    static lv_point_t line_points[2];
    (void)line_points;  // Unused for now
    
    // Add pulsing animation to nodes
    shield_anim_pulse(node_top, 2000);
    
    obj_k4 = k4_container;
    
    // === TOP LEFT: Voltage Gauge ===
    lv_obj_t *voltage_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(voltage_card, 140, 80);
    lv_obj_align(voltage_card, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    shield_style_card(voltage_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(voltage_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_label = lv_label_create(voltage_card);
    lv_label_set_text(volt_label, "VOLTAGE");
    lv_obj_align(volt_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(volt_label, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(volt_label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    lbl_voltage = lv_label_create(voltage_card);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_voltage, "5");
    lv_obj_align(lbl_voltage, LV_ALIGN_LEFT_MID, 0, 5);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_voltage, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_voltage, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    bar_voltage = lv_bar_create(voltage_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(bar_voltage, 120, 8);
    lv_obj_align(bar_voltage, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_bar_set_range(bar_voltage, 1, 10);
    lv_bar_set_value(bar_voltage, 5, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    shield_style_progress_bar(bar_voltage, SHIELD_STATUS_YELLOW);
    
    // === TOP RIGHT: Spoons Counter ===
    lv_obj_t *spoons_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoons_card, 140, 80);
    lv_obj_align(spoons_card, LV_ALIGN_TOP_RIGHT, 0, 0);
    shield_style_card(spoons_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(spoons_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoons_label = lv_label_create(spoons_card);
    lv_label_set_text(spoons_label, "SPOONS");
    lv_obj_align(spoons_label, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(spoons_label, SHIELD_TEXT_MUTED, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(spoons_label, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    obj_spoons = lv_label_create(spoons_card);
    lv_label_set_text(obj_spoons, "🥄🥄🥄🥄🥄\n🥄🥄🥄🥄🥄");
    lv_obj_align(obj_spoons, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 8);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(obj_spoons, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // === BOTTOM: Mode Indicator ===
    lv_obj_t *mode_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(mode_card, LV_PCT(100), 50);
    lv_obj_align(mode_card, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(mode_card, SHIELD_BG_TERTIARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(mode_card, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(mode_card, 1, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(mode_card, SHIELD_BORDER_DEFAULT, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(mode_card, SHIELD_RADIUS_LG, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(mode_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lbl_mode = lv_label_create(mode_card);
    lv_label_set_text(lbl_mode, "◉ NORMAL");
    lv_obj_center(lbl_mode);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(lbl_mode, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(lbl_mode, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// YOU ARE SAFE SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void breathing_anim_cb(void *var, int32_t v) {
    lv_obj_t *circle = (lv_obj_t *)var;
    int size = 80 + (v * 80 / 100);  // Scale from 80 to 160
    lv_obj_set_size(circle, size, size);
    lv_obj_center(circle);
}

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_safe(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(screen, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, "💚 YOU ARE SAFE");
    lv_obj_align(title, LV_ALIGN_TOP_MID, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Breathing circle
    lv_obj_t *breathe_container = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(breathe_container, 200, 200);
    lv_obj_align(breathe_container, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, -10);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(breathe_container, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(breathe_container, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(breathe_container, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *breathe_circle = lv_obj_create(breathe_container);
    lv_obj_set_size(breathe_circle, 100, 100);
    lv_obj_center(breathe_circle);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(breathe_circle, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(breathe_circle, LV_OPA_40, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_radius(breathe_circle, LV_RADIUS_CIRCLE, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(breathe_circle, 2, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_color(breathe_circle, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(breathe_circle, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    // Breathing animation (4-7-8 pattern)
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, breathe_circle);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, 0, 100);
    lv_anim_set_duration(&a, 4000);  // 4 second inhale
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, breathing_anim_cb);
    lv_anim_set_path_cb(&a, lv_anim_path_ease_in_out);
    lv_anim_set_playback_duration(&a, 8000);  // 8 second exhale
    lv_anim_set_playback_delay(&a, 7000);     // 7 second hold
    lv_anim_set_repeat_count(&a, LV_ANIM_REPEAT_INFINITE);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    // Breathing instruction
    lv_obj_t *instr = lv_label_create(breathe_container);
    lv_label_set_text(instr, "BREATHE");
    lv_obj_center(instr);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(instr, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(instr, &lv_font_montserrat_16, 0);
    
    // Reassurance text
    lv_obj_t *reassure = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(reassure, "Right now, your only job is to exist.\nThe Shield is handling the voltage.");
    lv_label_set_long_mode(reassure, LV_LABEL_LONG_WRAP);
    lv_obj_set_width(reassure, LV_PCT(90));
    lv_obj_align(reassure, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -10);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(reassure, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(reassure, &lv_font_montserrat_12, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_align(reassure, LV_TEXT_ALIGN_CENTER, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SETTINGS SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void voltage_slider_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *slider = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int32_t val = lv_slider_get_value(slider);
    g_shield_state.voltage = (uint8_t)val;
    if (voltage_change_cb) voltage_change_cb(val);
}

static void spoons_slider_cb(lv_event_t *e) {
    lv_obj_t *slider = lv_event_get_target(e);
    int32_t val = lv_slider_get_value(slider);
    g_shield_state.spoons = (uint8_t)val;
    if (spoons_change_cb) spoons_change_cb(val);
}

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_settings(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 48, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 64, 0);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(screen, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
    lv_obj_set_flex_align(screen, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_START, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER, LV_FLEX_ALIGN_CENTER);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_MD, 0);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, LV_SYMBOL_SETTINGS " SETTINGS");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Voltage setting
    lv_obj_t *volt_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(volt_card, LV_PCT(100), 70);
    shield_style_card(volt_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(volt_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_lbl = lv_label_create(volt_card);
    lv_label_set_text(volt_lbl, "Voltage Level");
    lv_obj_align(volt_lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(volt_lbl, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *volt_slider = lv_slider_create(volt_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(volt_slider, LV_PCT(90), 10);
    lv_obj_align(volt_slider, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -5);
    lv_slider_set_range(volt_slider, 1, 10);
    lv_slider_set_value(volt_slider, g_shield_state.voltage, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_ACCENT, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(volt_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, LV_PART_KNOB);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(volt_slider, voltage_slider_cb, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
    
    // Spoons setting
    lv_obj_t *spoon_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoon_card, LV_PCT(100), 70);
    shield_style_card(spoon_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(spoon_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoon_lbl = lv_label_create(spoon_card);
    lv_label_set_text(spoon_lbl, "Spoon Budget");
    lv_obj_align(spoon_lbl, LV_ALIGN_TOP_LEFT, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(spoon_lbl, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    
    lv_obj_t *spoon_slider = lv_slider_create(spoon_card);
    lv_obj_set_size(spoon_slider, LV_PCT(90), 10);
    lv_obj_align(spoon_slider, LV_ALIGN_BOTTOM_MID, 0, -5);
    lv_slider_set_range(spoon_slider, 0, 12);
    lv_slider_set_value(spoon_slider, g_shield_state.spoons, LV_ANIM_OFF);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_BG_ACCENT, LV_PART_MAIN);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, LV_PART_INDICATOR);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(spoon_slider, SHIELD_TEXT_PRIMARY, LV_PART_KNOB);
    lv_obj_add_event_cb(spoon_slider, spoons_slider_cb, LV_EVENT_VALUE_CHANGED, NULL);
    
    // Node ID display
    lv_obj_t *node_card = lv_obj_create(screen);
    lv_obj_set_size(node_card, LV_PCT(100), 50);
    shield_style_card(node_card);
    lv_obj_clear_flag(node_card, LV_OBJ_FLAG_SCROLLABLE);
    
    lv_obj_t *node_lbl = lv_label_create(node_card);
    char node_str[64];
    snprintf(node_str, sizeof(node_str), "Node: %s (0x%02X)", g_shield_state.callsign, g_shield_state.node_id);
    lv_label_set_text(node_lbl, node_str);
    lv_obj_center(node_lbl);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(node_lbl, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DEV SCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

lv_obj_t* shield_ui_create_dev(lv_obj_t *parent) {
    lv_obj_t *screen = lv_obj_create(parent);
    lv_obj_set_size(screen, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(screen, LV_OPA_TRANSP, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(screen, 0, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_all(screen, SHIELD_SPACE_SM, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_top(screen, 44, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_bottom(screen, 60, 0);
    lv_obj_set_flex_flow(screen, LV_FLEX_FLOW_COLUMN);
    lv_obj_set_style_pad_row(screen, 4, 0);
    
    // Title
    lv_obj_t *title = lv_label_create(screen);
    lv_label_set_text(title, "🔧 DEV DIAGNOSTICS");
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(title, SHIELD_CYAN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(title, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Telemetry output (monospace style)
    const char *telemetry_fmt = 
        "[ARCHITECT] F=750 H=266K S=0\n"
        "BAT=%d%% V=%d SPOONS=%d\n"
        "[ACCEL] X=%d Y=%d Z=%d\n"
        "[TOUCH] %s X=%d Y=%d\n"
        "[WIFI] %s RSSI=%ddBm\n"
        "[MODE] %s";
    
    lv_obj_t *telem = lv_label_create(screen);
    char buf[256];
    snprintf(buf, sizeof(buf), telemetry_fmt,
        g_shield_state.battery,
        g_shield_state.voltage,
        g_shield_state.spoons,
        g_shield_state.accel_x,
        g_shield_state.accel_y,
        g_shield_state.accel_z,
        g_shield_state.touch_active ? "ACTIVE" : "IDLE",
        g_shield_state.touch_x,
        g_shield_state.touch_y,
        g_shield_state.wifi_connected ? "ON" : "OFF",
        g_shield_state.wifi_rssi,
        get_mode_text(g_shield_state.mode)
    );
    lv_label_set_text(telem, buf);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(telem, SHIELD_STATUS_GREEN, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(telem, &lv_font_montserrat_12, 0);
    
    return screen;
}

    return screen;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MAIN UI FUNCTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOUCH INPUT DEVICE (LVGL Integration)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void touchpad_read_cb(lv_indev_drv_t *indev_drv, lv_indev_data_t *data) {
    static lv_coord_t last_x = 0;
    static lv_coord_t last_y = 0;
    static int error_count = 0;
    static int touch_count = 0;
    
    uint16_t tx, ty;
    esp_err_t ret = bsp_touch_read(&tx, &ty);
    
    if (ret == ESP_OK) {
        // Touch detected!
        touch_count++;
        
        // GT911 reports 480x320 (landscape), Display is 320x480 (portrait)
        // Try mapping: swap X/Y since orientations differ
        last_x = (lv_coord_t)ty;           // GT911 Y (0-319) -> Display X (0-319)
        last_y = (lv_coord_t)(479 - tx);   // GT911 X (0-479) -> Display Y (0-479, inverted)
        
        // Clamp to display bounds
        if (last_x < 0) last_x = 0;
        if (last_x > 319) last_x = 319;
        if (last_y < 0) last_y = 0;
        if (last_y > 479) last_y = 479;
        
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_PR;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        
        // Update global state
        g_shield_state.touch_active = true;
        g_shield_state.touch_x = tx;
        g_shield_state.touch_y = ty;
        
        // Debug: log touches (first 10, then every 50th)
        if (touch_count <= 10 || (touch_count % 50 == 0)) {
            ESP_LOGI(TAG, "[TOUCH] #%d Raw:(%d,%d) Mapped:(%d,%d)", touch_count, tx, ty, last_x, last_y);
        }
    } else if (ret == ESP_ERR_NOT_FOUND) {
        // No touch - normal
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_REL;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        g_shield_state.touch_active = false;
    } else {
        // Error reading touch
        error_count++;
        if (error_count <= 5 || (error_count % 100 == 0)) {
            ESP_LOGW(TAG, "[TOUCH] Read error: %s (count: %d)", esp_err_to_name(ret), error_count);
        }
        data->state = LV_INDEV_STATE_REL;
        data->point.x = last_x;
        data->point.y = last_y;
        g_shield_state.touch_active = false;
    }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BOOT SCREEN (OPUS-style)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

static void show_boot_screen(void) {
    lv_obj_t *boot_scr = lv_obj_create(NULL);
    lv_obj_set_size(boot_scr, LV_PCT(100), LV_PCT(100));
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_color(boot_scr, lv_color_hex(0x000000), 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_bg_opa(boot_scr, LV_OPA_COVER, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_border_width(boot_scr, 0, 0);
    lv_scr_load(boot_scr);
    
    // OPUS title
    lv_obj_t *opus_label = lv_label_create(boot_scr);
    lv_label_set_text(opus_label, "OPUS");
    lv_obj_center(opus_label);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(opus_label, SHIELD_GOLD, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(opus_label, &lv_font_montserrat_48, 0);
    
    // Subtitle
    lv_obj_t *subtitle = lv_label_create(boot_scr);
    lv_label_set_text(subtitle, "The Flow State Interface");
    lv_obj_align(subtitle, LV_ALIGN_CENTER, 0, 40);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_color(subtitle, SHIELD_TEXT_SECONDARY, 0);
    lv_obj_set_style_text_font(subtitle, &lv_font_montserrat_14, 0);
    
    // Animate fade in
    lv_anim_t a;
    lv_anim_init(&a);
    lv_anim_set_var(&a, opus_label);
    lv_anim_set_values(&a, LV_OPA_TRANSP, LV_OPA_COVER);
    lv_anim_set_time(&a, 1000);
    lv_anim_set_exec_cb(&a, (lv_anim_exec_xcb_t)lv_obj_set_style_opa);
    lv_anim_start(&a);
    
    // Process LVGL for boot animation (show for ~2 seconds)
    for (int i = 0; i < 120; i++) {
        lv_timer_handler();
        vTaskDelay(pdMS_TO_TICKS(16));  // ~60fps
